fact: Saudi Aramco, officially the Saudi Arabian Oil Company, is a majority state-owned petroleum and natural gas company, it is the national oil company of Saudi Arabia.

fact: Mercedes-Benz, commonly referred to simply as Mercedes and occasionally as Benz, is a German automotive brand that was founded in 1926.

fact: Toyota Motor Corporation is a Japanese multinational automotive manufacturer headquartered in Toyota City, Aichi, Japan.

fact: Red Bull is a brand of energy drinks created and owned by the Austrian company Red Bull GmbH.

fact: Guinness is a stout that originated in the brewery of Arthur Guinness at St.

fact: Labubu is a line of collectible plush toys created by Hong Kong illustrator Kasing Lung.

fact: Volkswagen is a German automobile manufacturer based in Wolfsburg, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fact: Aldi is the common company brand name of two German multinational family-owned discount supermarket chains operating over 13,500 stores in 18 countries.

fact: KFC Corporation, doing business as KFC, is an American multinational fast food restaurant chain specializing in Southern fried chicken and chicken sandwiches.

fact: 7-Eleven, Inc. is an American convenience store chain, headquartered in Irving, Texas.

fact: IKEA is a multinational conglomerate founded in Sweden that designs and sells ready-to-assemble furniture, household goods, and multiple various other related services.

fact: Exxon Mobil Corporation is an American multinational oil and gas corporation headquartered in Spring, Texas, a suburb of Houston.

fact: Barbie is a fashion doll franchise created by American businesswoman Ruth Handler, manufactured by American toy and entertainment company Mattel and introduced on March 9, 1959.

fact: Target Corporation, doing business as Target, is an American retail corporation headquartered in Minneapolis, Minnesota, United States.

fact: Pepsi is a carbonated soft drink with a cola flavor, manufactured by PepsiCo which serves as its flagship product.

fact: The Home Depot, Inc., often referred to as Home Depot, is an American multinational home improvement retail corporation which sells tools, construction products, appliances, and services including fuel and transportation rentals.

fact: Uniqlo Co., Ltd. is a Japanese designer and retailer specializing in fast fashion, with a focus on casual wear.

fact: The Rubik's Cube is a 3D combination puzzle invented in 1974 by Hungarian sculptor and professor of architecture Ernő Rubik.

fact: Volvo Car AB, trading as Volvo Cars, is a Swedish multinational manufacturer of luxury vehicles.

fact: In-N-Out Burgers, doing business as In-N-Out Burger, is an American regional chain of fast food restaurants with locations primarily in California and to a lesser extent the West Coast and Southwest.

fact: Kia Corporation is a South Korean multinational automobile manufacturer headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.

fact: Sandisk Corporation is an American multinational computer semiconductor company based in Milpitas, California.

title: Asahi Breweries is founded
subtitle: Japanese food and beverage company
fact: The Asahi Group Holdings, Ltd. is a Japanese beverage holding company headquartered in Sumida, Tokyo.

title: Hilton Hotels & Resorts is founded
subtitle: Hotel brand by Hilton Worldwide
fact: Hilton Hotels & Resorts is a global brand of full-service hotels and resorts and the flagship brand of American multinational hospitality company Hilton Worldwide.

title: Daihatsu is founded
subtitle: Japanese automobile manufacturer
fact: Daihatsu Motor Co., Ltd. is a Japanese automobile manufacturer headquartered in Ikeda, Osaka Prefecture, Japan.

title: Suntory is founded
subtitle: Japanese beverage company
fact: Suntory Holdings Limited is a Japanese multinational brewing and distilling company.

title: Massey Ferguson is founded
subtitle: Agricultural machinery manufacturing company
fact: Massey Ferguson is an agricultural machinery manufacturer, established in 1953 through the merger of farm equipment makers Massey-Harris of Canada and the Ferguson Company of Ireland.

title: Apple Store is founded
subtitle: Retail store chain for Apple products
fact: The Apple Store is a chain of retail stores owned and operated by Apple Inc.

title: Tetra Pak is founded
subtitle: Multinational food packaging and processing company
fact: Tetra Pak is a Swedish multinational food packaging and processing company headquartered in Switzerland.

title: Benetton Group is founded
subtitle: Italian multinational clothing retailer
fact: Benetton Group S.r.l. is a global fashion brand based in Ponzano Veneto, Italy, founded in 1965.

title: Zumba is founded
subtitle: Dance fitness workout method
fact: Zumba is an aerobic fitness workout method created in Cali, Colombia that combines cardio and Latin-inspired dance.

title: Carl's Jr. is founded
subtitle: American fast food restaurant chain
fact: Carl's Jr.

title: Proton is founded
subtitle: Automobile manufacturer
fact: Proton Holdings Berhad, commonly known as Proton, is a Malaysian multinational automotive company.

title: Elektra is founded
subtitle: American record label
fact: Elektra Records is an American record label owned by Warner Music Group, founded in 1950 by Jac Holzman and Paul Rickolt.

title: Aftermath Entertainment is founded
subtitle: American record label
fact: Aftermath Entertainment is an American record label founded by rapper and record producer Dr.

title: Mars is founded
subtitle: Chocolate bar brand
fact: Mars, commonly known as a Mars bar, is a chocolate bar produced by Mars Inc., consisting of caramel and nougat coated with milk chocolate.

title: Scion is founded
subtitle: Discontinued marque of Toyota
fact: Scion was a marque of Toyota that debuted in 2003 and was available only in the United States and Canada.

title: Polydor is founded
subtitle: German-British record label
fact: Polydor, also known as Polydor Records, is a British record label that operates as part of Universal Music Group.

title: Pathé is founded
subtitle: French media production and theater businesses
fact: Pathé SAS is a French major film production and distribution company, owning a number of cinema chains through its subsidiary Pathé Cinémas and television networks across Europe.

title: Decca is founded
subtitle: British record label
fact: Decca Records is a British record label established in 1929 by Edward Lewis after his acquisition of a gramophone manufacturer, The Decca Gramophone Company.

title: Holiday Inn is founded
subtitle: Upper-midscale hotel chain run by IHG
fact: Holiday Inn by IHG is an American chain of hotels based in Atlanta, Georgia and a brand of IHG Hotels & Resorts.

title: Twix is founded
subtitle: Chocolate-coated cookie candy bar
fact: Twix is a chocolate bar made by Mars Inc., consisting of a biscuit applied with other confectionery toppings and coatings.

title: A&M Records is founded
subtitle: American record label
fact: A&M Records is an American record label owned by Universal Music Group and functions as a branch of Interscope-Geffen-A&M.

title: GeForce is founded
subtitle: Brand of graphics processing units by NVIDIA
fact: GeForce is a brand of graphics processing units (GPUs) designed by Nvidia and marketed for the performance market.

title: Abarth is founded
subtitle: Italian automotive company
fact: Abarth & C.

title: Nespresso is founded
subtitle: Coffee brand owned by Nestlé S.A.
fact: Nestlé Nespresso S.A., trading as Nespresso, is an operating unit of the Nestlé Group, based in Vevey, Switzerland.

title: Mercury Records is founded
subtitle: American record label
fact: Mercury Records is an American record label owned by Universal Music Group.

title: Pentium is founded
subtitle: Brand of Intel microprocessors
fact: The Pentium is a discontinued series of x86 architecture-compatible microprocessors produced by Intel from 1993 to 2023.

title: Redmi is founded
subtitle: Chinese smartphone brand made by Xiaomi Corporation
fact: Redmi is a subsidiary brand owned by Chinese electronics company Xiaomi.

title: Nivea is founded
subtitle: German personal care brand that specializes in skin and body care
fact: Nivea is a German personal care brand that specializes in skin and body care.

title: Sheraton Hotels and Resorts is founded
subtitle: International hotel chain
fact: Sheraton Hotels and Resorts is an American international hotel chain owned by Marriott International.

title: Petrobras is founded
subtitle: Brazilian multinational oil and gas corporation
fact: Petróleo Brasileiro S.A., better known by and trading as the portmanteau Petrobras, is a Brazilian majority state-owned multinational corporation in the petroleum industry, which is headquartered in Rio de Janeiro.

title: Sub Pop is founded
subtitle: American record label
fact: Sub Pop is an independent record label founded in 1986 in Seattle by Bruce Pavitt and Jonathan Poneman.

title: The Body Shop is founded
subtitle: International cosmetics company
fact: The Body Shop International Limited, trading as the Body Shop, is a British cosmetics, skin care, and perfume company founded in 1976 by Anita Roddick, who opened her first store in Brighton, England.

title: Dunlop Tyres is founded
subtitle: International tyre brand
fact: Dunlop is a brand of tyres, currently owned and produced by the Japanese company Sumitomo Rubber Industries.

title: Wienerschnitzel is founded
subtitle: American fast food restaurant chain
fact: Wienerschnitzel is an American fast food chain that specializes in hot dogs and other food products.

title: Nio Inc. is founded
subtitle: Chinese car company
fact: Nio Inc. is a Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer headquartered in Shanghai.

title: Lukoil is founded
subtitle: Russian oil company
fact: PJSC Lukoil Oil Company is a Russian multinational energy corporation headquartered in Moscow, specializing in the business of extraction, production, transport, and sale of petroleum, natural gas, petroleum products, and electricity.

title: Shady Records is founded
subtitle: American record label
fact: Shady Records is an American record label founded by rapper Eminem and his manager Paul Rosenberg in 1999, following the commercially successful release of The Slim Shady LP that same year.

title: Playmobil is founded
subtitle: Toy line by Brandstätter Group
fact: Playmobil is a German line of toys produced by the Brandstätter Group, headquartered in Zirndorf, Germany.

title: PDVSA is founded
subtitle: Venezuelan government-owned oil company
fact: Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A. is the state-owned oil and gas company of Venezuela.

title: Sinopec is founded
subtitle: Chinese oil and gas company
fact: China Petroleum and Chemical Corporation, or Sinopec Group, is a Chinese oil and gas enterprise based in Chaoyang District, Beijing.

title: Reprise Records is founded
subtitle: American record label
fact: Reprise Records is an American record label founded in 1960 by Frank Sinatra.

title: Absolut Vodka is founded
subtitle: Swedish brand of vodka
fact: Absolut Vodka is a brand of vodka, produced near Åhus, in southern Sweden.

title: Hispano-Suiza is founded
subtitle: Automotive, engine, and armament manufacturer
fact: Hispano-Suiza is a Spanish automotive company.

title: Pemex is founded
subtitle: Mexican state-owned petroleum corporation
fact: Pemex is the Mexican state-owned petroleum corporation managed and operated by the Mexican government.

title: T-Mobile is founded
subtitle: International telecommunications company
fact: T-Mobile is the brand name used by some of the mobile communications subsidiaries of the German telecommunications company Deutsche Telekom AG in the Czech Republic, Poland and the United States.

title: Alipay is founded
subtitle: Third-party online payment platform in China
fact: Alipay is a third-party mobile and online payment platform, established in Hangzhou, China in February 2004 by Alibaba Group and its founder Jack Ma.

title: Massimo Dutti is founded
subtitle: Multinational clothing retailer from Spain
fact: Massimo Dutti, S.A. is a Spanish premium clothing retailer specializing in cashmere and wool products, established in 1985 and owned by Spanish multinational company Inditex, the parent company of Zara, Pull&Bear, and other brands.

title: Nescafé is founded
subtitle: Instant coffee brand
fact: Nescafé is a brand of instant coffee sold by the multinational food and drink corporation Nestlé.

title: Mirinda is founded
subtitle: Brand of soft drink
fact: Mirinda is a brand of soft drink that was created in Spain in 1959 and has been distributed globally by PepsiCo since 1970.

title: Braun is founded
subtitle: German consumer products company based in Kronberg
fact: Braun GmbH is a German consumer products company founded in 1921 and based in Kronberg im Taunus, Hesse.

title: XL Recordings is founded
subtitle: British record label
fact: XL Recordings is a British independent record label founded in 1989 by Tim Palmer and Nick Halkes.

title: Alexander McQueen is founded
subtitle: British luxury fashion house
fact: Alexander McQueen is a British luxury fashion house founded by the designer Alexander McQueen in 1992.

title: Bounty is founded
subtitle: Chocolate bar manufactured by Mars, Incorporated
fact: Bounty is a British coconut-filled, chocolate-enrobed candy bar manufactured by Mars Inc. since 1951.

title: Repsol is founded
subtitle: Spanish multinational energy and petrochemical company
fact: Repsol S.A. is a Spanish multinational energy and petrochemical company based in Madrid.

title: China National Petroleum Corporation is founded
subtitle: Chinese state-owned oil and gas corporation
fact: The China National Petroleum Corporation is a major national oil and gas corporation of China and one of the largest integrated energy groups in the world.

title: Duracell is founded
subtitle: American manufacturer of batteries
fact: Duracell Inc., commonly referred to as Duracell, is an American manufacturer of alkaline batteries, specialty cells, and rechargeables; it is a wholly owned subsidiary of Berkshire Hathaway since 2016.

title: Head & Shoulders is founded
subtitle: Brand of anti-dandruff shampoo produced by Procter & Gamble
fact: Head & Shoulders (H&S) is an American brand of anti-dandruff and non-dandruff shampoo produced by parent company Procter & Gamble.

title: Kenwood Corporation is founded
subtitle: Japanese radio manufacturing company
fact: Kenwood Corporation is a Japanese consumer electronics brand owned by JVCKenwood since 2008.

title: PetroChina Company Limited is founded
subtitle: Chinese oil and gas company
fact: PetroChina Company Limited is a Chinese oil and gas company and is the listed arm of state-owned China National Petroleum Corporation (CNPC), headquartered in Dongcheng District, Beijing.

title: Pilsner Urquell is founded
subtitle: Beer trademark
fact: Pilsner Urquell is a lager beer brewed at Asahi Breweries' Pilsner Urquell Brewery in Plzeň, Czech Republic.

title: Jysk is founded
subtitle: Danish multinational furniture company
fact: Jysk A/S is a Danish retail chain specializing in household goods, including mattresses, furniture, and interior décor.

title: Edeka is founded
subtitle: German supermarket chain
fact: The Edeka Group is the largest German supermarket corporation as of 2017, holding a market share of 25.3%.

title: Pull&Bear is founded
subtitle: Multinational clothing retailer from Spain
fact: Pull&Bear is a Spanish clothing and accessories retailer based in Narón, A Coruña, Spain, founded in 1991.

title: Sire is founded
subtitle: American record label
fact: Sire Records is an American record label owned by Warner Music Group and distributed by Warner Records.

title: Deutsche Grammophon is founded
subtitle: German classical music record label
fact: Deutsche Grammophon is a German classical music record label that was the precursor of the corporation PolyGram.

title: JTBC is founded
subtitle: South Korean nationwide general cable TV network and broadcasting company
fact: JTBC is a South Korean nationwide pay television network.

title: Bubble wrap is founded
subtitle: Pliable transparent plastic material
fact: Bubble wrap is a pliable transparent plastic material commonly used for protecting fragile items during shipping.

title: Napalm Records is founded
subtitle: Austrian record label
fact: Napalm Records is an Austrian independent record label focused on heavy metal, hard rock and folk/folk rock/folk metal.

title: Smashburger is founded
subtitle: American fast-food chain
fact: Smashburger IP Holder LLC, doing business as Smashburger, is an American multinational fast-casual hamburger restaurant chain founded in Denver, Colorado.

title: Sofia Metro is founded
subtitle: Rapid underground transit system of Sofia, Bulgaria
fact: The Sofia Metro is the rapid transit network servicing the Bulgarian capital city Sofia.

title: Verve Records is founded
subtitle: American record label
fact: Verve Records is an American record label owned by Universal Music Group (UMG).

title: GMM Grammy is founded
subtitle: Entertainment media group company in Thailand
fact: GMM Grammy Public Company Limited is the largest media conglomerate entertainment company in Thailand.

title: Nuclear Blast is founded
subtitle: German independent record label, specialised in metal and related music styles
fact: Nuclear Blast Records is a German record label with subsidiaries in Germany, the United States and Brazil.

title: Nestea is founded
subtitle: Iced tea brand
fact: Nestea is a Swiss brand of iced tea and other beverages owned by Nestlé, Nestea provides a variety of tea products, including liquid and powdered tea concentrates, refrigeratable teas, and ready-to-drink bottles dispensed by vendor or vending machine.

title: Metal Blade Records is founded
subtitle: American independent record label
fact: Metal Blade Records is an American independent record label founded by Brian Slagel in 1982 based in the U.S. state of California.

title: Claas is founded
subtitle: International agricultural machinery company from Harsewinkel, Germany
fact: CLAAS is an agricultural machinery manufacturer based in Harsewinkel, Germany, in the federal state of North Rhine Westphalia.

title: Thalys is founded
subtitle: High-speed train service connecting the Netherlands, Belgium, Germany and France
fact: Thalys was a brand name used for high-speed train services between Paris Gare du Nord and both Amsterdam Centraal and German cities in the Rhein-Ruhr, including Aachen, Cologne, Düsseldorf, Duisburg, Essen and Dortmund, both via Brussels-South.

title: Neoplan is founded
subtitle: Bus and coach brand
fact: Neoplan Bus GmbH is a German automotive company that manufactures buses, trolleybuses and coaches.

title: Minsk Automobile Plant is founded
subtitle: Belarusian automotive industry manufacturer of commercial vehicles
fact: Minsk Automobile Plant is a state-run automotive manufacturer association in Belarus, one of the largest in Eastern Europe.

title: Century Media Records is founded
subtitle: German record label
fact: Century Media Records is a German heavy metal record label with offices in Germany, the United States and the United Kingdom.

title: Spinnin' Records is founded
subtitle: Dutch record label based in Hilversum
fact: Spinnin' Records is a Dutch electronic music record label founded in 1999 by Eelko van Kooten and Roger de Graaf.

title: Bear Brand is founded
subtitle: Milk brand of Nestle
fact: Bear Brand is a drink and powdered milk brand currently owned by Nestlé.

title: Fundació Joan Miró is founded
subtitle: Museum of modern art about Joan Miró located in Barcelona
fact: The Fundació Joan Miró is a modern art museum honoring the life and work of the Spanish artist Joan Miró, located on the hill called Montjuïc in Barcelona, Catalonia (Spain).
